title: Lead Instructional Designer at Oxford University Press India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Oxford University Press India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Oxford University Press India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Oxford University Press India:
Oxford University Press India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oxford University Press India!
